title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CAN-AVID AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAN-AVID, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, TO CAN-AVID NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE

chunks.text:
H. No. 22843

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7613, June 19, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CAN-AVID AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAN-AVID, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, TO CAN-AVID NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Can-Avid Agricultural College in the Municipality of Can-Avid, Province of Eastern Samar, is hereby changed to Can-Avid National Agricultural College.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and February 7, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JUN 19 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
